banner_matchers.value: ^220 ([-\w_.]+) DBMail LMTP service ready to rock\r\n

^220 ([\w.-]+) LMTP
214-This is DBMail-LMTP\.
214-The following commands are supported:
214-LHLO, RSET, NOOP, QUIT, HELP\.
214-VRFY, EXPN, MAIL, RCPT, DATA\.
214-For more information about a command:
214 Use HELP <command>\.
